section.heading: Information exchange with payroll data providers

subsection.heading: In general
subsection.chapeau: The Commissioner of Social Security may enter into an information exchange with a payroll data provider for purposes of—

subparagraph.content: monthly insurance benefits under subsections (d)(1)(B)(ii), (d)(6)(A)(ii), (d)(6)(B), (e)(1)(B)(ii), and (f)(1)(B)(ii) of section 402 of this title and subsection (a)(1) of section 423 of this title; and
supplemental security income benefits under subchapter XVI; and

paragraph.content: preventing improper payments of such benefits without the need for verification by independent or collateral sources.

subsection.heading: Notification requirements
subsection.chapeau: Before entering into an information exchange pursuant to subsection (a), the Commissioner shall publish in the Federal Register a notice describing the information exchange and the extent to which the information received through such exchange is—

subparagraph.content: accurately determine entitlement to, and the amount of, benefits described under subparagraph (A) of subsection (a)(1);
accurately determine eligibility for, and the amount of, benefits described in subparagraph (B) of such subsection; and
prevent improper payment of such benefits; and

content.p: The term “payroll data provider” means payroll providers, wage verification companies, and other commercial or non-commercial entities that collect and maintain data regarding employment and wages, without regard to whether the entity provides such data for a fee or without cost.
The term “information exchange” means the automated comparison of a system of records maintained by the Commissioner of Social Security with records maintained by a payroll data provider.

section.sourceCredit: (Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 531, title XI, § 1184, as added Pub. L. 114–74, title VIII, § 824(a), Nov. 2, 2015, 129 Stat. 607.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective one year after Nov. 2, 2015, see section 824(e) of Pub. L. 114–74, set out as an Effective Date of 2015 Amendment note under section 425 of this title.

note.heading: Regulations
